---
title: "About this blog"
description: |
  HDAT9800 health data science blog
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

This site supports **HDAT9800 — Visualisation and Communication of Health Data** (UNSW, Term 2 2026).

It is built with [Distill](https://rstudio.github.io/distill/) for R Markdown and hosted on GitHub Pages.

Posts will cover data visualisation exercises, reproducible analysis, and course reflections.
